title: syzygium australe
intro: Syzygium australe, also known as the Australian lilly pilly or waterberry, is a small to medium-sized tree native to eastern Australia. The medicinal properties of Syzygium australe include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function. Syzygium australe can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is also used as a food ingredient in some traditional Australian recipes.
